reason: This is a religious reflection that references a Quranic verse about seeking help from God when feeling defeated. It uses standard Islamic teachings without extremist rhetoric.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: قد يشعر المصلح بالهزيمة وغلبة الباطل عليه وهذا شعور لا يُحوّل الصادق ولا يُبدّله ( فدَعَا ربَّهُ أنّي مغلوبٌ فانتصِر)
